reviews.comment:
Pésima,  fui a buscar un presupuesto,  por un arreglo en el coche y nunca me lo dieron. Que me llamaban x tel y todavía estoy esperando

(Translated by Google)
Terrible. I went to get a quote for a car repair and they never gave me one. They said they'd call me back and I'm still waiting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwdGJmMzB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Tardan mucho en cargar nafta, poco personal para atender, como en todos lados

(Translated by Google)
They take a long time to fill up with gas, and there's not enough staff to help, just like everywhere else.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwNWUyQ2RBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar ,para llevar los coche al taller es muy recomendable , su atención es exelente, y en todos los ruglos.

(Translated by Google)
A very good place to take your car to the workshop, highly recommended. Their service is excellent, and in all situations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwa1k3NEd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Te atienden rapido y muy amable! Lo unico que el que infla las gomas del auto .te saca las tapita y no las pone de nuevo! . Mal ahi. Ojo!

(Translated by Google)
They serve you quickly and are very friendly! The only thing is that the guy who pumps up the tires on your car takes off the tire caps and doesn't put them back on! Bad place. Watch out!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwX3JtYlVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención , 7AM , 1 playero atendioendo y otro playero mientras charlaba con este y no atienden.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, 7 AM, 1 attendant serving and another attendant chatting with him and not attending.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwaXJTQTRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar impecable, los servicios y la atención igual, lo malo es que casi nunca hay lugar para estacionar el auto para bajar a comprar algo al Full.

(Translated by Google)
The place is impeccable, the services and attention are the same, the bad thing is that there is almost never a place to park the car to go buy something at Full.
